name: tsort
description: Topological sort of a directed graph
readme:
Short:        Topological sort of a directed graph
Type:         util/cli
Architecture: m68k-amigaos >= 3.0
Uploader:     duncan (at) bowring (dot) us
Author:       Marc Espie, OpenBSD (ported by Duncan Bowring)
Version:      1.38

tsort - Topological sort of a directed graph

Original author: Marc Espie, OpenBSD
Ported by Duncan Bowring using amiport (AI-assisted porting toolkit).
Project: https://github.com/bdgscotland/amiport

Cross-compiled with bebbo-gcc for AmigaOS 3.x (68000+).
Tested via vamos emulator and FS-UAE with Workbench 3.1.

Standalone binary, no ixemul.library needed (-noixemul).

Includes full source code (original POSIX and ported Amiga versions)
and PORT.md documenting every transformation applied.
porting_notes: OpenBSD tsort 1.38 ported to AmigaOS 3.x. 25/25 FS-UAE tests pass. Uses 32768 byte stack (larger than typical) to handle deep dependency graphs. Standard amiport transformations: argv expansion, Amiga exit codes.
